creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
Oops, you're right, sorry.

Modified patch [1] takes out the JITC option; there's an i386-specific
section in src/system/arch that needs nasm anyway... if we're going
through the installation of nasm on i386 then we may as well make use
of the optimisations.

Alternatively, you could leave the OPTION in and code around that?

Chris

[1] http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/pearpc-nasm-depend.diff
